No Other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Granted.

Michael Brooks Carroll, of Law Offices of Michael Brooks Carroll, Tel. 415.788.7600, for plaintiffs;
Marshall E. Bluestone, of Senneff Freeman & Bluestone, LLP, Tel. 707.526.4250, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT ROBERT DILLS' Motion To Set Aside Default is taken under submission. Judge Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/SRB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Michael Brooks Carroll, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, ADAM P. NOAH and MELINDA M. SCULLY NOAH.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ROBERT WAYNE DILLS and GREATER BY BUILDIRS, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 30 dismissed without prejudice. Counsel for Plaintiff to file dismissal.
Plaintiff Adam P. Noah sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows: See scanned judgment.
Court will take the matter under submission and issue judgment. Cousel for Plaintiff to file the documents submitted to the Court in support of request for Default Judgment heard this day. Counsel to file documentation electronically and submitt courtesy copies directly to department 514 as soon as possible.
Court adjourned.
